rationale: No regression in test-runnability. The jq slot-count proof is structural and runnable: jq is available, command substitution compares jq's numeric output to "12", and the threshold check uses -r. Bead 1's cmd gate is runnable and sufficient: cmd/mindspec is a single package here, so go test ./cmd/mindspec covers the renderer test that falsifies a skipped CountValue deref. The new gates-configured cmd advisory test is a real falsifier because a bead panel matching the bead gate but not the global default fails under unwired 109 comparison.
